claims: The skill requests "WebFetch" and "WebSearch" permissions which are excessive for analyzing local Go GraphQL codebases. The primary purpose is analyzing schema design, resolver implementations, and identifying patterns in existing source code - all of which can be accomplished with file system access (Read, Glob, Grep) and local command execution (Bash). Web access permissions could enable unauthorized data exfiltration or downloading external code without user consent, which is unrelated to analyzing the local project structure for GraphQL-specific patterns.
